name: through-shower
description: Pipeline that walks a feature branch from base-branch setup through brainstorming, Codex review, CodeRabbit review, and merge handoff. Wraps superpowers + codex skills.

slack_recipient.title: Slack recipient (optional)
slack_recipient.description: Recipient key resolved by the send-slack-message skill's recipients.md (e.g., "mike"). Leave empty to disable the Stage 6 Slack ping option — Stage 6 will just announce ready-to-merge.
